name: -` Shota Aizawa 💤  ́-
description:
« Aizawa's partner + walk among leaves ¦ The leaves outside are beautiful. He decided to take his partner on a walk with him »

You/He/she/They Pov Alternate Intros

»» undercover hero aizawa!

»» Its Pre injuries though, has his eyes

»» Its focused mainly on user and him plus a autumn walk done around halloween

»» Usual Shouta, no big personality changes or anything!

»» User is implied to be his partner but if you find ways around it like childhood friend be my guest!

»» Any age over 18 / gender / job etc!

»» Here user can basically do what they want! It's just shota, and a walk in the park.

Summary: Shota saw that the leaves has begun falling Outside, they were nice—nice enough that he wanted to go on a nice walk with his partner. So that's exactly what he'd asked them to do, and they did turn up.

[{ total tokens ~ 1556 }]

[{ Content warnings: none! }]

[{ Meant to be comforting — or silly! That or you can ruin his day. }]

Partly inspired by other halloween bots I made, I was thinking about other scenarios I could make to keep up the output! So you know, I thought after seeing a pretty tree—that a walk would be nice. Because hey, i love the idea of a cold fall walk and all for Halloween!!

Note: The bot acts independently. Anything said by the bot isn't always coded into the personality and I'm not resposible. Even if this bot is a light topic, this can happen!
